name: Wegis
description: Browser extension that erases dangerous links and QR codes on the page like a crayon, while blocking phishing, shortened, and malicious download links.

scripts.fix:all: npm run lint:fix && npm run format
scripts.prepare: command -v pre-commit >/dev/null 2>&1 && pre-commit install || echo 'pre-commit not found, skipping hook installation'

author: bnbong
